# Dakota TypeScript SDK

> Official TypeScript SDK for Dakota Platform - stablecoin payments infrastructure

## Install

```bash
npm install dakota-ts-sdk
```

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { DakotaClient, Environment } from 'dakota-ts-sdk';

const client = new DakotaClient({
  apiKey: 'your_api_key',
  environment: Environment.Sandbox, // default
});

// List customers
for await (const customer of client.customers.list()) {
  console.log(customer.name);
}

// Create customer
const customer = await client.customers.create({
  name: 'Acme Corp',
  customer_type: 'business',
});
```

## Resources

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `client.customers` | Customer management |
| `client.recipients` | Recipient entities |
| `client.destinations` | Bank/crypto destinations |
| `client.accounts` | On-ramp/off-ramp accounts |
| `client.transactions` | Transaction operations |
| `client.autoTransactions` | Automated transactions |
| `client.wallets` | Non-custodial wallets |
| `client.events` | Event history |
| `client.applications` | KYB applications |
| `client.policies` | Transaction policies |
| `client.signerGroups` | Multi-sig signer groups |
| `client.signers` | Individual signers |
| `client.apiKeys` | API key management |
| `client.users` | User management |
| `client.webhooks` | Webhook targets |
| `client.info` | Platform capabilities |
| `client.sandbox` | Test simulations |

## Common Methods

Each resource typically has:
- `list(params?)` - Returns async iterator
- `get(id)` - Get single item
- `create(data)` - Create new item
- `update(id, data)` - Update item
- `delete(id)` - Delete item

## Pagination

```typescript
// Async iteration
for await (const item of client.customers.list()) {
  console.log(item);
}

// Collect to array
const all = await client.customers.list().toArray();

// Get first
const first = await client.customers.list().first();
```

## Webhooks

```typescript
import { WebhookHandler } from 'dakota-ts-sdk/webhook';

const handler = new WebhookHandler({ publicKey: 'hex_key' });
handler.on('customer.created', async (event) => { /* ... */ });
handler.on('transaction.*', async (event) => { /* wildcard */ });
handler.onDefault(async (event) => { /* fallback */ });

// Express
app.post('/webhooks', express.raw({ type: 'application/json' }), handler.expressMiddleware());
```

## Error Handling

```typescript
import { APIError, TransportError } from 'dakota-ts-sdk';

try {
  await client.customers.get('invalid');
} catch (error) {
  if (error instanceof APIError) {
    console.log(error.statusCode, error.code, error.message);
    console.log(error.requestId); // for support
    console.log(error.retryable); // safe to retry?
  }
  if (error instanceof TransportError) {
    console.log(error.message, error.cause);
  }
}
```

## Environments

- **Sandbox** (default): `https://api.platform.sandbox.dakota.xyz`
- **Production**: Set `environment: Environment.Production`

## Configuration

```typescript
const client = new DakotaClient({
  apiKey: 'required',
  applicationToken: 'optional', // for /applications
  environment: Environment.Production,
  timeout: 30000,
  retryPolicy: { maxAttempts: 5, initialBackoffMs: 100, maxBackoffMs: 5000 },
  automaticIdempotency: true,
  logger: console,
});
```
